Get in Touch

Have questions? Ready to book? We're here to help. Reach out by phone, email, or visit us in Kailua.

Visit Us

130 Kailua Road
Kailua, HI 96734

Located near Kailua Beach Park. Look for the blue and gold shopfront with kayaks out front.

Get Directions

Hours of Operation

Monday - Friday
7:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday & Sunday
6:30 AM - 6:00 PM

Tours depart daily. Morning tours typically start between 7:00-8:00 AM. Afternoon tours available by request. Closed on major holidays.

Ready to Book?

Use our live booking system to check availability and reserve your spot instantly. Or give us a call — we're happy to help you choose the perfect tour.

Book on FareHarbor Call (808) 555-1234
P

Free Parking

Ample parking available at our Kailua Road location

Bus

Bus Accessible

TheBus routes stop within walking distance of our shop

Bike

Bike Parking

Secure bike racks available if you're arriving by bike

Prefer to Talk to a Real Person?

Call us at (808) 555-1234. We answer the phone — no automated menus, no hold music. Just our team, ready to help.

Can't reach us? Leave a message and we'll call back within one business day. Or email aloha@activeoahutours.com — we typically respond within 2 hours during business hours.

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
